category_sources: Official GeographicLib documentation describes geodesic, coordinate conversion, gravity, geoid, geomagnetic, and triaxial ellipsoid calculations
docs_sources: Official SourceForge-hosted documentation is the dedicated documentation site
Official library page documents the C++ library and repository family
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/geographiclib/geographiclib, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: Official documentation lists geodesic, UTM, UPS, MGRS, geocentric, gravity, and magnetic-field functionality
source_facts.description identifies a C++ geography library
